item.name: Mandragora Queen
item.description: Though wed to the Tomato King in a move to strengthen the bond of houses Tomato and Mandragora, the queen longs to steal away with her one true love─the Eggplant Knight. What will become of this forbidden romance!? Use item to acquire the Mandragora Queen minion and find out!
item.tooltip:
I want to be waist-deep
in little white mandragora
limbs!
  - Yellowjacket
item.specialactiondescription: Restores 100 HP to all allies within range (150 if the ally is a critter).
